welcome.title: Your Own AI Agent, One Click Away
welcome.desc:
Install OpenClaw quickly and easily,
then chat with AI on Telegram

wslSetup.title: WSL Setup
wslSetup.notAvailable: This feature requires Windows 10 version 2004 or later.
wslSetup.checkVersion: Run winver to check your Windows version.
wslSetup.wslRequired: WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux) is required to run OpenClaw.
wslSetup.autoInstall: It will be installed automatically with administrator privileges.
wslSetup.rebootDesc: A reboot is required to complete the WSL installation. Please restart EasyClaw after rebooting.
wslSetup.ubuntuInitDesc: Ubuntu is registered but needs initialization.
wslSetup.wslReady: WSL is ready. Proceeding to next step...
wslSetup.wslError: An error occurred during WSL installation
wslSetup.ubuntuError: An error occurred during Ubuntu installation

install.desc: The following items will be installed

apiKeyGuide.title: Choose AI Provider
apiKeyGuide.desc: Select an AI provider and get your API key

getApiKey.google: Get API Key from AI Studio

apiKeyGuide.oauthDesc: Sign in with your ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription

telegramGuide.title: Create a Telegram Bot
telegramGuide.desc: Let's create a Telegram bot to chat with your AI agent

steps.title: Search for BotFather
steps.desc: Search for @BotFather in the Telegram app. Select the official bot with the blue checkmark.

steps.title: Enter /newbot Command
steps.desc: Type /newbot in the BotFather chat. It will ask you for a bot name.

steps.title: Enter Bot Display Name
steps.desc: Enter a display name for your bot. Example: EASYCLAW

steps.title: Choose Bot Username
steps.desc: Enter a unique ID ending with _bot. Example: my_easyclaw_bot

steps.title: Copy Bot Token
steps.desc: Done! Make sure to copy the token in the format 123456:ABCDEF...

portStatus.gwRunningNoPort: Gateway is running but not using the port
